top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Player_Attributes pa
WHERE pa.overall_rating BETWEEN 60 AND 65
  AND pa.attacking_work_rate = 'high'
  AND pa.defensive_work_rate = 'low';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Player_Attributes pa
WHERE pa.overall_rating BETWEEN 60 AND 65
  AND pa.attacking_work_rate = 'high'
  AND pa.defensive_work_rate = 'low';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Player_Attributes pa
WHERE pa.overall_rating BETWEEN 60 AND 65
  AND pa.attacking_work_rate = 'high'
  AND (pa.defensive_work_rate = 'low' OR pa.defensive_work_rate = 'medium');

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Player_Attributes pa
WHERE pa.overall_rating BETWEEN 60 AND 65
  AND pa.attacking_work_rate IN ('high', 'medium')
  AND pa.defensive_work_rate IN ('low', 'medium');

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Player_Attributes pa
WHERE pa.overall_rating BETWEEN 60 AND 65
  AND pa.attacking_work_rate = 'high'
  AND pa.defensive_work_rate = 'low';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Player_Attributes pa
WHERE pa.overall_rating BETWEEN 60 AND 65
  AND pa.attacking_work_rate = 'high'
  AND (pa.defensive_work_rate = 'low' OR pa.defensive_work_rate = 'medium');

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Player_Attributes pa
WHERE pa.overall_rating BETWEEN 60 AND 65
  AND pa.attacking_work_rate IN ('high', 'medium')
  AND pa.defensive_work_rate IN ('low', 'medium');

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Player_Attributes pa
WHERE pa.overall_rating BETWEEN 60 AND 65
  AND pa.attacking_work_rate = 'high'
  AND pa.defensive_work_rate = 'low';
